penalties.description: Visible gap remains in the Penrose drain slit after the final knot, as confirmed by both models.

consensus_score.reasoning: Both models agreed on task completion and slit_not_closed penalty. Significant timing disagreement (150s vs 210s) was resolved by taking the midpoint. Both models confirmed the slit gap was visible in final assessment frames.

disagreements.rationale: 60-second disagreement with no clear rubric guidance on timing methodology; midpoint provides conservative estimate while acknowledging both observations.
Standard slit_not_closed penalty is 10 points per occurrence; GPT's 20-point deduction appears to be an arithmetic error for single penalty instance.
